steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content:
The decisive clue is the emotional reaction that follows: “all gladness left him and a deep melancholy settled down upon his spirit.

Thirty yards of board fence nine feet high.” Tom's sadness comes directly from seeing the enormous size of the fence.

The word “surveyed” must describe how Tom came to realize this overwhelming task.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Examined expresses careful observation — Tom examined (looked over carefully) the fence and grasped its massive scale, which triggered his despair. Adjusted, organized, and complimented don't fit the context of visual assessment. That matches choice A — A is correct.
